reason_for_decision: The article passes with a strong architecture-level comparison of FMCW and pulse radar, especially around integration burden, range behavior, and mission fit.
strengths: The article explains why waveform choice affects the whole sensing chain, not only the transmit method.
It keeps the FMCW-versus-pulse discussion tied to power, packaging, minimum range, and surveillance role.
The selection sequence near the end makes the technical comparison actionable for engineering teams.
summary_assessment: This is a high-quality comparison article. It is technically credible, restrained, and useful for readers making waveform-family decisions.
